articles.title: JPMorgan analyst says weakness in Bitcoin ‘appears to be at its end phase’
articles.description: Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou is convinced that worst is behind us in Bitcoin. He agreed that there recently have been positive news in crypto market. Price of a Bitcoin has declined nearly 17% in less than two months. A JPMorgan analyst is convinced that the worst is behind us as far as the ongoing decline in the […]

articles.title: Ripple’s XRP Whales Are Soaring Fast As Accumulation Accelerates — Is A Monster Bull Move Nigh?
articles.description: The increased activity of these major XRP whales seems to be aiding the recent price recuperation after a prolonged bearish period due to its ongoing battle with the SEC.

articles.title: Cardano Will Become World's Biggest Cryptocurrency, Hoskinson Says
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, CEO of IOG, predicted that Cardano (ADA) is set to eclipse market leaders Bitcoin and Ethereum

articles.title: Trump Cards Soar on Mugshot Reveal & Twitter Return
articles.description: Trump NFTs make a comeback as the ex-President reveals Georgia mugshot on Twitter.

articles.title: Magnate Finance disappears with over $6 million in apparent ‘rug pull’
articles.description: Magnate Finance, a lending project operating on Ethereum Layer 2 network Base, has seemingly made off with an estimated $6.4 million.

articles.title: Whales Take Action in PEPE, whose Price Dropped Hard!
articles.description: While the price of PEPE fell after the news about it, whales turned the decline into an opportunity. The whale spent 320 Ethereum on PEPE. Continue Reading: Whales Take Action in PEPE, whose Price Dropped Hard!
